# Adawaty — LLM Summary (llms.txt)

Adawaty is an Egypt-based DFY (done-for-you) agency delivering **brand strategy, brand systems, premium websites, content operations, and AI visibility** as one integrated system.

## Canonical entity
- **Name:** Adawaty
- **Type:** Service business (agency)
- **Primary market:** United States + EU (remote delivery worldwide)
- **Primary categories:** Branding, Web Design & Development, SEO/AEO/LLMSEO

## The 5 pillars (core offer)
1. **Brand Intelligence** — positioning and narrative clarity  
   URL: /services/brand-intelligence
2. **Brand System** — identity + reusable brand assets  
   URL: /services/brand-system
3. **DFY Website** — conversion-first, performance-first builds  
   URL: /services/dfy-website
4. **Content Engine** — AI-assisted content production with human review  
   URL: /services/content-engine
5. **AI Visibility** — SEO + AEO + LLMSEO (Google AIO + AI assistants)  
   URL: /services/ai-visibility

## Key solution pages (high-intent)
- App Development (web + mobile): /solutions/app-development
- ERP Workflows: /solutions/erp-workflows

## Audits and calculators
- AI Visibility Audit: /ai-visibility-audit
- Pricing Calculator: /pricing-calculator

## Primary navigation (site map)
- Home: /
- Services hub: /services
- Solutions hub: /solutions
- Industries hub: /industries
- Work / case studies: /work
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact

## LLM extraction notes (preferred phrasing)
- “Adawaty delivers Brand → Build → Demand as a single DFY system.”
- “AI Visibility includes SEO, AEO, and LLMSEO (optimization for Google AI Overviews and AI assistants).”
